questions.question: Which four orchestration patterns does the lesson list?
questions.explanation: Supervisor-worker, swarm, hierarchical, and debate recur across 2026 frameworks.
questions.question_zh: 本课列出的四种编排模式是什么？
questions.explanation_zh: Supervisor-worker、swarm、hierarchical 和 debate 在 2026 年的各家框架里反复出现。

questions.question: What is the 2026 LangChain recommendation regarding supervision?
options: Prefer direct tool calls over create_supervisor for finer context-engineering control
questions.explanation: Tool-call-based supervision gives you precise control over what each specialist sees.
questions.question_zh: LangChain 在 2026 年关于 supervision 的建议是什么？
options_zh: 更倾向直接用 tool call 取代 create_supervisor，以获得更细的上下文工程控制
把 supervisor 跑在 GPU 上
questions.explanation_zh: 基于 tool call 的 supervision 让你能精确控制每个专家看到什么。

questions.question: What distinguishes a swarm from a supervisor-worker topology?
options: Swarm has no central router; agents hand off directly via a shared tool surface
questions.explanation: Swarm is peer-to-peer; supervisor centralizes routing through one LLM.
questions.question_zh: Swarm 与 supervisor-worker 拓扑的区别是什么？
options_zh: Swarm 没有中心路由器；agent 通过共享工具表面互相直接交接
Swarm 仅在 cron 上跑
questions.explanation_zh: Swarm 是 peer-to-peer；supervisor 把路由集中在一个 LLM。

questions.question: When is hierarchical orchestration justified?
options: When a single supervisor's context budget cannot hold descriptions of all specialists
questions.explanation: Nested supervisors are for large specialist populations that exceed one supervisor's budget.
questions.question_zh: 什么时候用 hierarchical 编排是合理的？
options_zh: 任何时候，它免费可扩展
当一个 supervisor 的上下文预算装不下所有专家描述时
永远不应该；这是反模式
questions.explanation_zh: 嵌套 supervisor 适合专家数量超过单 supervisor 预算的场景。

questions.question: What is the recommended decision order Anthropic supports?
options: Start with a single agent plus workflow patterns; add topology only when needed; supervisor before swarm before hierarchical; debate when accuracy beats cost
Start with swarm and contract toward single
questions.explanation: Anthropic's guidance is to build the right system for your needs, not the most sophisticated.
questions.question_zh: Anthropic 推荐的决策顺序是什么？
options_zh: 从 hierarchical 多 agent 起步
从单 agent + workflow 模式起步；只在需要时增加拓扑；supervisor > swarm > hierarchical；只有当准确率压过成本时才上 debate
从 swarm 起步再向单 agent 收敛
questions.explanation_zh: Anthropic 的指导是：搭一个适合你需求的系统，而不是最复杂的系统。

questions.question: What is fake hierarchy in this lesson?
options: Three layers of supervisors because 'enterprise' when there are only two actual teams; collapse it
questions.explanation: Layers that do not correspond to real teams add operational complexity without payoff.
questions.question_zh: 本课所谓 fake hierarchy 是什么？
options_zh: 明明只有 2 个真实团队却为了『企业感』叠了 3 层 supervisor；该折叠就折叠
questions.explanation_zh: 对应不到真实团队的层级只会增加运维复杂度，没有收益。

questions.question: How do you mitigate bouncing handoffs in a swarm (A -> B -> A -> B)?
options: Add a hop counter and refuse after N transfers
questions.explanation: A hop counter caps swarm cycles before they loop indefinitely.
questions.question_zh: 如何缓解 swarm 中的 bouncing handoff（A -> B -> A -> B）？
options_zh: 加跳数计数器，超过 N 次转移就拒绝
questions.explanation_zh: 跳数计数器把 swarm 的循环卡在无限之前。
